task_description: Create a complete live trading system for the CCT Rectangle Bot on MetaTrader 5. The system connects to MT5, fetches live candle data, runs the existing CCT Rectangle strategy in real-time, executes trades with proper risk management, and includes safety controls and a dashboard.

verification.summary: All 10 files created in live_mt5/ directory. All Python files pass syntax validation (ast.parse). RISK_PER_TRADE=0.01 (conservative 1%). DEMO_MODE=True by default. Strategy imports from parent directory via sys.path. All safety controls implemented (daily loss, trade count, drawdown, trading hours). Reconnection with exponential backoff. Committed to feat/cct-rectangle-bot-v2 branch.
